author: Bert
content:
Hey Guys & Girls. I have a topic I’d like to hear everyone’s views on - would honestly appreciate any ideas or thoughts. Despite the DAO mechanics not being in place yet we still have a DAO treasury that is capturing the in-game revenues (r4) and I’ve wondered how it will be utilised when the time is right. 

What does everyone see as the best possible use for this $ATLAS when the time comes? I do not know the exact balance but I believe the treasury wallet address is public knowledge. 

Michael has stated some possible options are for it to be distributed to polis stakers, use for player growth campaigns/ marketing, or invest further into game development. 

What are your thoughts?

author: [AEP] Lingeke
content:
I think, it's important to make an early decisionon the use of the Atlas accumulating from fees, taxes etc.
As I see it, Polis is like shares of a company. Therefore, it needs to have game related income AND governance.
I would propose a percentage type system. I.e. paying out 20-30% of all fees, taxes etc. out to Polis holders. Use 40-50% for in game missions, drops or hidden treasures etc.
And have 30-40% set aside for future development costs.
These bands should be fixed with an early DAO vote and only able to change with a 66% vote.
See it as a constitutional implementation of taxes and it's use. Otherwise, there will be little Atlas for pay outs within the game at some point with high pay-outs to Polis holders and increasing fees etc.
I see this being a very fundamental decision for the future economy within the game and for the governance.
